title: Leyte-based crypto wallet firm expands network, pushes ‘use-controlled’ model
description: Tacloban City-based cryptocurrency payments firm Paytaca is expanding its footprint as a digital wallet provider in the Philippines, signing up more than 300 merchants that accept Bitcoin Cash as payment.The post Leyte-based crypto wallet firm expands network, pushes ‘use-controlled’ model appeared first on Newsbytes.PH.

title: Better, Coinbase launch crypto-backed conforming mortgage product
description: Better Home & Finance Holding Co., the parent of digital lender Better.com, and Coinbase have launched a token-backed product that allows qualified borrowers to pledge Bitcoin or USDC as collateral for a conforming mortgage down payment, without selling their digital assets.
